./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import inspect
from sympy import lambdify
from sympy.printing.pycode import PythonCodePrinter
from sympy.utilities.lambdify import lambdastr, _recursive_to_string
for expr in [(1,), (1,2), [(1,)], ((1,),), ()]:
    f = lambdify([], expr)
    print(repr(expr), '->', repr(inspect.getsource(f)), 'value=', repr(f()), 'type=', type(f()).__name__)
print('printer singleton:', PythonCodePrinter().doprint((1,)))
print('recursive singleton:', _recursive_to_string(PythonCodePrinter().doprint, (1,)))
print('lambdastr singleton:', lambdastr([], (1,)))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import inspect
from sympy import lambdify, pycode
from sympy.printing.pycode import PythonCodePrinter
from sympy.printing.lambdarepr import LambdaPrinter, lambdarepr
from sympy.core.containers import Tuple

cases = [(), (1,), (1,2), [1], {1: 2}, Tuple(1)]
for expr in cases:
    print(repr(expr), 'pycode=', pycode(expr), 'lambda=', lambdarepr(expr), 'value=', lambdify([], expr)())
print(repr(inspect.getsource(lambdify([], (1,)))))
print(PythonCodePrinter.mro())
print(LambdaPrinter.mro())
print(inspect.getsource(PythonCodePrinter._print_tuple))
print(inspect.getsource(LambdaPrinter._print_tuple))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import inspect
from sympy import lambdify, pycode
from sympy.printing.pycode import PythonCodePrinter
from sympy.printing.lambdarepr import LambdaPrinter, lambdarepr
from sympy.core.containers import Tuple

cases = [(), (1,), (1,2), [1], {1: 2}, Tuple(1)]
for expr in cases:
    print(repr(expr), 'pycode=', pycode(expr), 'lambda=', lambdarepr(expr), 'value=', lambdify([], expr)())
print(repr(inspect.getsource(lambdify([], (1,)))))
print(PythonCodePrinter.mro())
print(LambdaPrinter.mro())
print(inspect.getsource(PythonCodePrinter._print_tuple))
print(inspect.getsource(LambdaPrinter._print_tuple))
PY"

/bin/zsh -lc "./.venv/bin/python - <<'PY'
import inspect
from sympy import lambdify
from sympy.utilities.lambdify import _EvaluatorPrinter
from sympy.printing.lambdarepr import LambdaPrinter
p=LambdaPrinter()
for expr in [(), (1,), (1,2), ((1,),), [(1,)]]:
    f=lambdify([],expr)
    print(repr(expr), repr(inspect.getsource(f)), 'call=',repr(f()))
    print('printer=', p.doprint(expr), 'funcstr=', _EvaluatorPrinter(p).doprint('_lambdifygenerated', [], expr))
PY"
